---
title: "Data Science, Technology, & More"
listing:
  type: default
  contents: /*/index.qmd
  sort: "date desc"
  sort-ui: true
  feed: true
  filter-ui: true
  categories: numbered
  image-placeholder: thumbnail-placeholder.jpg
  fields: [image, title, subtitle, date, reading-time, description, categories]
comments: false
---
